title: ochna leucophloeos
intro: Ochna leucophloeos, also known as the Mickey Mouse plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Southern Africa for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Ochna leucophloeos include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the leaves or roots, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
